ab: hngi’an ryax wayan hani ga bsuyan mu knerin ru kung mnwah sami Bnka tayux mama.
ch: 這個假日，我和姊姊去台北拜訪叔叔。
en: This holiday, my sister and I went to Taipei to visit my uncle.

ab: t’aring sami Tuyuhara mluw kisya musa Bnka.
ch: 我們從豐原搭火車去臺北。
en: We took the train from Fengyuan to Taipei.

ab: tehuk sami Bnka lga mniray haya ru muwah n_gan kisya mlmuh sami ku mama.
ch: 到了台北，叔叔開車來車站接我們。
en: When we arrived in Taipei, my uncle drove to the station to pick us up.

ab: ini ktwahi ku hnari n_gan kisya ru sali na mama miray haya ini kbsya tehuk la.
ch: 車站離叔叔家沒有很遠，開車一下子就到了。
en: The station is not far from my uncle’s house, and it’s just a short drive away.

ab: llingay sali ni mama ga kyan utux rahu na kklhangan kating mit mgluw sami miray ling ling aya musa kya.
ch: 叔叔家附近有個很大的牧場，我們一起騎腳踏車到牧場。
en: There is a big ranch near my uncle’s house, and we rode bicycles to the ranch together.

ab: mki sami klhangan mit kating lga rasun sami ni mama musa sma’an mit ru mluw uma.
ch: 在牧場，叔叔帶我們餵羊和騎馬。
en: In the ranch, my uncle took us to feed the sheep and ride horses.

ab: gbyan lga mgluw sami musa heci kgabi.
ch: 晚上，我們一起去市區吃飯。
en: In the evening, we went to the city to have dinner together.

ab: pyux haya traku mki heci nanu ye’asa ku miray sami otobay musa kya.
ch: 市區車子很多，所以我們騎摩托車去那裡。
en: There are a lot of cars in the city, so we go there by motorcycle.

ab: pshri sami lga txan ga wayan kri’un otobay la ’si sami gluw bas mshri.
ch: 要離開的時候，發現摩托車被偷了，我們只好搭公車離開。
en: When we were about to leave, we found that the motorcycle had been stolen, so we had to leave by bus.

ab: misu soni niya sami mbinah Tuyuhara ba’aw ta wayan luwan ni mama ku otobay nya la.
ch: 現在我們回到豐原了，不知道叔叔的摩托車找到了沒有。
en: Now that we are back in Fengyuan, I don’t know if my uncle’s motorcycle has been found.
